grammarInScope: Presente de indicativo: irregulares frecuentes (ser, estar, tener, ir, hacer, poder, querer)
Genero y numero de sustantivos y adjetivos
Interrogativos (que, quien, donde, como, cuando, cuanto, por que)
Ir a + infinitivo (planes), tener que + infinitivo (obligacion)
Preposiciones basicas (en, de, a, con, por, para)
grammarOutOfScope: Perifrasis verbales excepto ir a + inf y tener que + inf

inappropriateExerciseTypes.reason: Transformation too cognitively demanding at A1
Error correction requires system knowledge to detect errors; student has not internalized the system
Inductive discovery only possible at end of A1.2 with heavy scaffolding
Matching headings/paragraphs requires texts too long and abstract for A1
Ordering paragraphs requires logical cohesion skills not yet developed
Cloze without word bank too abstract; only appropriate with full word bank at A2+
Inference and deduction require reading skills not yet developed
Register and intent identification requires pragmatic awareness beyond A1
Open role-play: insufficient linguistic resources to sustain unguided interaction
Sustained monologue (2+ min) exceeds A1 productive capacity
Debate requires argumentation the A1 student does not yet have
Negotiation too cognitively and linguistically demanding

instructionLanguage: L1 for procedural instructions, L2 for linguistic content
metalanguageLevel: Minimal: verbo, nombre, adjetivo only. Avoid: conjugar, concordancia, paradigma.
errorCorrection: Immediate and explicit. Teacher provides correct form. Brief explanation. Student cannot self-correct because the system is not yet internalized. Example: 'Es soy, no estoy, porque hablamos de identidad, no de estado.'

guidedWriting.complexity: Very simple, concrete situations. One main task.
